name: Spiced Pumpkin Cheesecake with Pecan Praline
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a 9-inch springform pan by buttering the sides and bottom.
2. Combine graham or vanilla wafer crumbs, walnuts, and melted butter; press into the sides and on the bottom of the pan. Chill.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until light. Gradually add sugar, flour, and spices, beating well after each addition.
4. Add eggs one at a time, blending thoroughly after each addition.
5. Mix in pumpkin puree and blend well.
6. Pour the batter into the chilled pan and bake in the center of the oven at 325°F for 90 minutes.
7. Turn off the heat and let the cake stand with the door open for 30 minutes.
8. Cool on a rack, then chill for 2 hours.
9. Top with praline.
- Nutty Praline Topping: In a small saucepan, combine sugar and cream. Cook over medium heat until the sugar dissolves. Simmer for 5 minutes or until thickened. Remove from heat; stir in nuts. Keep stirring until the praline becomes slightly stiff before pouring it onto the chilled cheesecake.
10. Serve with whipped cream.
